title: Consolidate to single VERSION constant
description: Hardcoded version strings in 40+ files (1.0.0, 1.2.1, 1.2.3, 1.2.5) drift from real version 1.4.0. Add a single VERSION export in src/version.ts (or similar) that reads from package.json. Replace hardcoded strings in: src/index.ts, src/stdio-server.ts, src/http-server.ts, src/openapi.ts, src/mcp/MCPServer.ts, src/mcp/BaseTool.ts, src/mcp/schema.ts, src/mcp/transports/stdio.transport.ts, src/smithery-sdk.ts, every src/tools/homeassistant/*.tool.ts, every src/tools/examples/*.tool.ts, smithery.yaml.
validation: grep -r 'version: "1\.0\.0"\|version: "1\.2' src/ smithery.yaml. Should return 0 matches after.
